Operationalisation: Warm-season mean diurnal temperature range (DTR; daily Tmax − Tmin, °C)
Number of warm-season days in 2022 with daily Tmax exceeding the city- and calendar-day-specific 90th-percentile threshold derived from the 2002–2021 baseline
Number of warm-season nights in 2022 with daily Tmin exceeding the city- and calendar-day-specific 90th-percentile threshold derived from the 2002–2021 baseline
Warm-season mean Normalised Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI), city-averaged over the built-up footprint
Population-weighted greenness exposure within a 1-km residential buffer
Population-weighted Gini coefficient of green exposure across residents (higher = more unequal green access)
Mean VIIRS day–night band night-time lights radiance
City income indicator standardised across 50 cities
Composite index (0–100) based on climate action plan presence + C40 membership + ICLEI membership
Composite index (0–100) based on heat action plan (or actionable heat chapter) + official cooling-spaces network
Weighted mean of HG and CG
For each service category, *_p is the number of residents living in spatial units whose walk-time accessibility to the nearest destination in that category is within 15 minutes.
For each service category, *_c is the share of the city population that falls within the 15-minute walking threshold to at least one destination in that category.
For each service category, *_w is the population-weighted mean walking time (minutes) to the nearest destination in that category.
